name: n8n:community-pr-readiness-check
tagline: Triages n8n community PRs (CLA/title/tests/cubic checks) and syncs GitHub labels plus Linear tickets.
verdict: Well-built triage workflow: concrete steps, an explicit JSON output contract, and confirmation gates before closing PRs or cancelling tickets. Solid collision-guard and re-review handling. Weak on hygiene: no version signal, a colon in the frontmatter name breaks kebab-case, and no stated out-of-scope guidance for this repo-specific flow.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions anywhere; a complex n8n-io-repo-specific triage flow that could misfire if invoked on unrelated PRs.
Frontmatter name is 'n8n:community-pr-readiness-check' — the colon breaks kebab-case (^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$).
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
